leakage_audit.note_en: Prompts contain problem and trace only; process labels/span annotations are post-hoc fields. The erroneous mathematical sentence itself remains part of the trace by design.
leakage_audit.note_zh: prompt 只包含题目和 trace；过程标签/span 标注仅用于事后分析。错误数学句子本身当然仍作为 trace 内容出现。

model_spec.loader_risk: large model; multimodal/text config may require AutoModelForImageTextToText fallback
model_spec.notes: core local P0 medium frontier model; Google medium Gemma 4 31B instruction model; downloaded via HF mirror on 2026-04-27; use multi-GPU device_map=auto for verifier/generation
